common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

businessIntelligence.title: Business Intelligence
businessIntelligence.subtitle: A workbench for business analysis and operational insights based on fixed data sources.
businessIntelligence.serviceUnavailable: Business intelligence service is unavailable or misconfigured ({{status}} {{statusText}}).
businessIntelligence.invalidJsonResponse: The business intelligence endpoint returned HTML instead of JSON. Check businessIntelligenceServiceUrl or dev proxy settings.

tabDescriptions.executiveSummary: Core scale and risk summary across four ITIL data categories.
tabDescriptions.slaAnalysis: Multi-dimensional SLA compliance analysis with breach investigation.
tabDescriptions.eventAnalysis: Incident management KPIs, trend changes, and type distribution based on incident ticket data.
tabDescriptions.changeAnalysis: Change success rate trends, type distribution, risk levels, and plan compliance.
tabDescriptions.requestAnalysis: Request trends, SLA compliance, satisfaction scores, and top request categories.
tabDescriptions.problemAnalysis: Problem trends, root cause analysis, resolution health, and root cause distribution.
tabDescriptions.crossProcessCorrelation: Deep correlation and risk propagation paths across changes, incidents, requests, and problems.
tabDescriptions.workforce: Team efficiency analysis: volume, speed, and quality across three dimensions.

businessIntelligence.loadingDescription: The first load computes and caches the analysis result. Please wait.
businessIntelligence.emptyDescription: Make sure the service is running and the data directory contains valid Excel files.

dashboard.healthScoreDescription: The overall health indicator for the current executive summary.
dashboard.totalRisksDescription: Critical risks, warnings, and attention items are consolidated in the workspace below.
dashboard.overviewDescription: Reserved for the overall judgment, summary conclusion, and key changes in the current period.
dashboard.evidenceDescription: Reserved for key metrics and supporting context for the assessment.
dashboard.risksDescription: Reserved for the highest-priority risks and governance direction.
dashboard.governanceDescription: Reserved for governance actions, ownership, and current focus items.

heroSummary.Stable: Operations are stable, but continue monitoring fluctuations in key processes.
heroSummary.Watch: Operations are controlled, but some processes need attention. Prioritize top risks.
heroSummary.Risk: Overall health is at risk. Focus on resolving critical issues immediately.

riskImpact.change-failure: Release stability has declined. Prioritize reviewing high-risk changes.
riskImpact.problem-closure: Root cause and permanent fix backlog is growing, risk will compound.
riskImpact.request-open: Fulfillment experience is under pressure, wait times will increase.
riskImpact.change-incident: Release quality and change validation have weak points.
riskImpact.request-csat: Service experience is fluctuating, consider reviewing frequent requests.

chat.startConversation: Start a conversation by typing a message below.
chat.skillPickerMoreResults: {{count}} more match. Keep typing to narrow the list.
chat.skillPickerMoreResults_other: {{count}} more matches. Keep typing to narrow the list.
chat.skillPickerNoSkills: No skills are installed for this agent.
chat.emptyAssistantResponse: The model did not return a valid response. This may be a temporary service issue.
chat.agentNoResponse: Agent did not respond, please try again
chat.agentIdleTimeout: Agent stopped responding, please try again
chat.agentConnectionLost: Agent connection lost, please try again

sessionErrors.frontendEventsDisconnected: Connection to the conversation was interrupted. Reconnecting without cancelling the running task.
sessionErrors.gatewaySubmitTimeout: The request was not accepted before the submit timeout. Check whether the task is already running before retrying.
sessionErrors.gatewaySubmitFailed: Gateway could not submit the request to the agent service.
sessionErrors.gatewayEventsFailed: Gateway could not open the conversation event stream.
sessionErrors.gatewayCancelFailed: Gateway could not submit the cancellation request to the agent service.
sessionErrors.gatewayUnauthorized: You are not authorized to use this agent.
sessionErrors.gatewayAgentNotFound: This agent or session is not available.
sessionErrors.gatewayAgentUnavailable: The agent service is temporarily unavailable.
sessionErrors.gatewayGoosedUnavailable: Gateway could not connect to the agent service.
sessionErrors.gatewayMaxDurationReached: This task reached the platform time limit.
sessionErrors.gatewayRateLimited: Too many requests are being submitted. Wait and retry later.
sessionErrors.goosedActiveRequestConflict: Another task is already running in this session.
sessionErrors.goosedRequestRejected: The agent service rejected this request.
sessionErrors.goosedError: The agent service returned an error.
sessionErrors.providerRateLimited: The model provider is rate limited. Wait and retry later.
sessionErrors.providerAuthOrQuotaFailed: The model provider is not configured correctly or quota is exhausted.
sessionErrors.toolExecutionFailed: A tool call failed while processing this request.
sessionErrors.mcpUnavailable: An external tool service is unavailable.
sessionErrors.contextTooLarge: The request or conversation context is too large.
sessionErrors.unknown: The task failed. Use the reference information below for troubleshooting.

actions.check_tool: Check the tool or external service

newSession.title: New Chat Session
newSession.workingDirHint: The directory where Goose will operate. This affects file operations and tool access.
newSession.initialMessagePlaceholder: What would you like to start with?

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Active and configured agents available through the gateway.
agents.noAgentsHint: Configure agents in the gateway to see them here.
agents.noMatch: No agents match the current filters.
agents.agentIdHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
agents.idInvalid: Agent ID must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
agents.deleteAgentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"?
agents.deleteAgentWarning: This will only remove the agent system configuration (config files, prompts, skills). User session data and chat history will be retained.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Create and manage knowledge bases. Document import and indexing configuration are completed on the configure page.
knowledge.name: Knowledge Base Name
knowledge.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose and scope of this knowledge base.
knowledge.statusActiveDescription: Active and available for document ingestion and retrieval requests.
knowledge.statusDisabledDescription: Disabled and not currently used for document processing or retrieval.
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete knowledge base "{{name}}"?
knowledge.deleteWarning: This will delete the knowledge base documents, chunks, and generated artifacts. This action cannot be undone.
knowledge.emptyHint: Create an empty knowledge base first, then complete import and indexing from the configure page.
knowledge.configurePlaceholder: Document import, preprocessing, indexing, and retrieval testing will be completed here next.
knowledge.supportingDataWarning: Some supporting configuration data could not be loaded. Basic source settings are still available.
knowledge.settingsOverviewDescription: Review source metadata, profile bindings, and system defaults before editing.
knowledge.profileBindingsDescription: The source is linked to these index and retrieval profiles.
knowledge.currentBindingsDescription: The source currently points to these index and retrieval profiles. Binding changes affect later requests.
knowledge.profileConfigUnavailable: Full profile config is unavailable right now.
knowledge.indexProfileParamsDescription: All parameters currently stored in the bound index profile. Most changes require document rebuild or re-ingestion before they take effect.
knowledge.retrievalProfileParamsDescription: All parameters currently stored in the bound retrieval profile. In the current implementation, not every field is fully consumed at runtime.
knowledge.defaultsDescription: These values come from deployment config file `config.yaml`, and changes require a knowledge-service restart.
knowledge.defaultsUnavailable: System defaults are unavailable right now.
knowledge.featuresDescription: Feature flags and editable fields are loaded from the service at runtime.
knowledge.configReadOnlyDescription: This page explains where each parameter comes from and how changes take effect. Parameters themselves are not edited here yet.
knowledge.indexProfileEditorDescription: Configure Lucene analyzers, BM25, and field boosts. Changes here affect future indexing and lexical retrieval.
knowledge.retrievalProfileEditorDescription: Configure TopK, RRF, lexical and semantic thresholds, and snippet settings for retrieval. Changes here affect future search requests.
knowledge.profileStateSystemDefaultDescription: Editing creates a source-specific copy. Other knowledge bases remain on the default profile.
knowledge.profileStateSourceOwnedDescription: Changes affect only this knowledge base.
knowledge.configSaveCreatedCustomSuccess: Created a source-specific profile and saved the changes
knowledge.resetIndexProfileConfirm: Restore this knowledge base to the system default index profile?
knowledge.resetRetrievalProfileConfirm: Restore this knowledge base to the system default retrieval profile?
knowledge.resetIndexProfileHint: After restoring the default index profile, rebuild is required before indexing changes fully take effect.
knowledge.resetRetrievalProfileHint: After restoring the default retrieval profile, later search requests will use the system default settings.
knowledge.resetIndexProfileSuccess: Restored the system default index profile for this knowledge base
knowledge.resetRetrievalProfileSuccess: Restored the system default retrieval profile for this knowledge base
knowledge.configSourceBoundIndexProfile: Bound index profile for this knowledge base
knowledge.configSourceBoundRetrievalProfile: Bound retrieval profile for this knowledge base
knowledge.configDescriptionFallback: Controls the system behavior associated with this parameter.
knowledge.configEffectBindingChange: Applies to later requests after binding changes are saved
knowledge.configEffectRebuildRequired: Usually requires document rebuild or re-ingestion before taking effect
knowledge.configEffectSearchRequest: Applies to later retrieval requests; some fields are not fully consumed in the current implementation
knowledge.configEffectRestartService: Requires restarting knowledge-service after the change
knowledge.configEffectRuntimeSnapshot: Runtime snapshot only, used to describe current service state
knowledge.configDescConvertEngine: Controls which parser converts source files into intermediate text.
knowledge.configDescAnalysisLanguage: Declares the primary document language and affects text analysis behavior.
knowledge.configDescIndexAnalyzer: Tokenizer used while building the index.
knowledge.configDescQueryAnalyzer: Tokenizer used while parsing user queries.
knowledge.configDescChunkingMode: Controls how documents are segmented into chunks.
knowledge.configDescChunkingTargetTokens: Sets the target chunk size in tokens.
knowledge.configDescChunkingOverlapTokens: Sets how much neighboring chunks overlap.
knowledge.configDescChunkingRespectHeadings: Whether chunking should prefer heading boundaries.
knowledge.configDescChunkingKeepTablesWhole: Whether tables should stay together in a single chunk when possible.
knowledge.configDescTitleBoost: Raises the ranking weight of title matches.
knowledge.configDescTitlePathBoost: Raises the ranking weight of heading path matches.
knowledge.configDescKeywordBoost: Raises the ranking weight of keyword matches.
knowledge.configDescContentBoost: Controls the base ranking weight of main content.
knowledge.configDescBm25K1: Controls BM25 sensitivity to repeated term frequency.
knowledge.configDescRetrievalMode: Sets the default retrieval mode for new search requests.
knowledge.configDescLexicalTopK: Limits how many lexical candidates are kept before ranking.
knowledge.configDescSemanticTopK: Limits how many semantic candidates are kept before ranking.
knowledge.configDescRrfK: Controls the smoothing factor used by reciprocal rank fusion.
knowledge.configDescScoreThreshold: Filters out results whose final score for the active retrieval mode falls below this threshold.
knowledge.configDescSemanticThreshold: Filters semantic retrieval results by semantic score. Hybrid mode does not use this threshold.
knowledge.configDescLexicalThreshold: Filters keyword retrieval results by lexical score. Hybrid mode does not use this threshold.
knowledge.configDescRetrievalStrategy: Controls how multiple retrieval result sets are fused.
knowledge.configDescFinalTopK: Caps how many results are returned to the user.
knowledge.configDescSnippetLength: Controls how much text is shown in each result snippet.
knowledge.configDescIngestMaxFileSizeMb: Maximum size allowed for one uploaded file.
knowledge.configDescIngestAllowedContentTypes: Allowed file types for document ingestion.
knowledge.configDescIngestDeduplication: How duplicate uploaded files are detected.
knowledge.configDescIngestSkipExisting: Whether existing files are skipped by default during ingestion.
knowledge.configDescFeatureAllowChunkEdit: Whether manual chunk editing is enabled in the current service.
knowledge.configDescFeatureAllowChunkDelete: Whether manual chunk deletion is enabled in the current service.
knowledge.configDescFeatureAllowExplain: Whether retrieval explain responses are enabled in the current service.
knowledge.configDescFeatureAllowRequestOverride: Whether test requests can override retrieval settings.
knowledge.configDescCapabilityRetrievalModes: Retrieval modes currently supported by the service.
knowledge.configDescCapabilityChunkModes: Chunking modes currently supported by the service.
knowledge.configDescCapabilityExpandModes: Result expansion modes currently supported by the service.
knowledge.configDescCapabilityAnalyzers: Analyzers currently supported by the service.
knowledge.configDescCapabilityEditableChunkFields: Chunk fields that can be edited manually.
knowledge.maintenanceActionsDescription: Use this when existing documents need to be processed again.
knowledge.maintenanceCurrentTaskDescription: Track the current rebuild stage, progress, and last update time.
knowledge.maintenanceLastJobDescription: Review the latest rebuild result and failure details.
knowledge.maintenanceNoCurrentTask: There is no maintenance task running right now.
knowledge.rebuildHint: Trigger document processing and index rebuilding with the current source configuration.
knowledge.rebuildConfirmBody: Rebuild knowledge base "{{name}}" from the uploaded original files.
knowledge.rebuildConfirmDowntime: During rebuild, retrieval, comparison tests, document upload, and chunk editing will be unavailable for this knowledge base.
knowledge.rebuildConfirmChunkWarning: Rebuild replaces the current chunk results and may discard manually edited chunks.
knowledge.rebuildFailed: Failed to submit knowledge base rebuild: {{error}}
knowledge.configPendingRebuildNotice: Index settings have changed but are not active for existing documents yet. Run rebuild to apply them to the whole knowledge base.
knowledge.deleteActionHint: Deletion removes all documents, chunks, and generated artifacts in this knowledge base. This cannot be undone.
knowledge.saveFailed: Failed to save knowledge base settings
knowledge.documentsPlaceholderDescription: Document upload, preview, and maintenance actions will live here in the next step.
knowledge.documentsTabDescription: This list shows documents under knowledge base "{{name}}". Uploaded files are ingested into the current knowledge base.
knowledge.downloadDocumentNotAvailable: The current knowledge-service instance does not expose the original-file download API yet. Restart knowledge-service and try again.
knowledge.docEmptyState: No documents in this knowledge base yet. Upload a file to start ingesting.
knowledge.docNoMatch: No documents match the current filters.
knowledge.docPreviewUnavailable: No previewable artifact content is currently available.
knowledge.deleteDocumentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete document "{{name}}"?
knowledge.deleteDocumentWarning: This removes the document record, chunks, original file, and generated artifacts. You can upload it again afterward.
knowledge.uploadSubtitle: Files are ingested directly into the current knowledge base.
knowledge.uploadDropHint: Or use the button below to choose files, up to {{max}} per batch, {{sizeMb}} MB total.
knowledge.uploadSummarySuccess: The request completed and the service confirmed {{count}} imported documents. Refresh the list to verify final state.
knowledge.uploadSummaryPartial: The request completed and the service confirmed {{imported}} / {{total}} imported files. Others may have been skipped or require list refresh to confirm.
knowledge.uploadFileTooLarge: The file exceeds the current single-file size limit of the knowledge service.
knowledge.uploadTypeUnsupported: The file type is outside the currently allowed ingest range.
knowledge.uploadBatchTooMany: Selected {{count}} files, exceeding the limit of {{max}} per batch. Please reduce the number of files.
knowledge.uploadBatchTooLarge: Total batch size is ~{{size}} MB, exceeding the {{max}} MB limit. Please reduce the number of files.
knowledge.docReasonProcessing: The service is still processing this document
knowledge.docReasonNoChunks: No chunks have been generated yet
knowledge.chunksPlaceholderDescription: Chunk list, filters, and side-panel editing will be added here next.
knowledge.chunksTabDescription: Review and maintain chunk content under knowledge base "{{name}}".
knowledge.chunkSearchPlaceholder: Search chunk ID, content, keyword, or document...
knowledge.chunkNoDocuments: No documents are available yet. Upload a document before creating or editing chunks.
knowledge.chunkEmptyState: No chunks are available in the current scope yet.
knowledge.chunkNoMatch: No chunks match the current filters.
knowledge.chunkCreateDescription: Add a manually maintained chunk under the selected document.
knowledge.chunkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete chunk "{{name}}"?
knowledge.chunkDeleteWarning: This removes the chunk from retrieval and cannot be undone.
knowledge.chunkDocumentRequired: Select a document before saving the chunk.
knowledge.chunkKeywordsPlaceholder: Separate keywords with commas or line breaks.
knowledge.retrievalDescription: Test the current knowledge base retrieval results with a query text.
knowledge.retrievalQueryPlaceholder: Enter a question, topic, or key phrase, for example: qwen3
knowledge.retrievalBindingHint: This run uses the currently bound retrieval profile and does not modify the knowledge base configuration.
knowledge.retrievalHistoryDescription: Click a history row to restore the query and run the test again.
knowledge.retrievalResultsDescription: These are the hits shown for the current test. Open one to inspect the full chunk content.
knowledge.retrievalCompareDescription: Compare the first {{count}} displayed hits from each retrieval mode under the same query.
knowledge.retrievalCompareEmpty: Run a test to compare the three retrieval modes side by side here.
knowledge.retrievalCompareWarningIdentical: All retrieval modes returned the exact same result order. The backend may not be splitting execution by mode.
knowledge.retrievalCompareWarningSemanticZero: Vector retrieval returned semanticScore = 0 for all hits. Semantic retrieval may not be active.
knowledge.retrievalCompareWarningSemanticInactive: All retrieval modes returned the same results and vector retrieval reported semanticScore = 0 for every hit. The backend is likely still serving the same lexical retrieval result set.
knowledge.retrievalEmptyDescription: Enter a query first, then click Run Test to inspect the retrieval result.
knowledge.retrievalNoResults: No chunks matched the current query.
knowledge.retrievalNoResultsThreshold: Raw hits were returned, but all of them were filtered out by the current threshold.
knowledge.retrievalModeIdle: Switch to this mode and run the test to load results.
knowledge.retrievalModeSemanticDescription: Generate a query embedding and look for text chunks with the most similar vector representation.
knowledge.retrievalModeLexicalDescription: Match relevant text chunks by keywords and exact terms.
knowledge.retrievalModeHybridDescription: Combine keyword and vector results for a side-by-side comparison of the final quality.
knowledge.retrievalSettingsDescription: Choose the retrieval method and parameters for this test run.
knowledge.retrievalMethodHint: Hybrid retrieval is recommended by default. Use other methods for side-by-side comparison.
knowledge.retrievalSettingsParamsDescription: These settings affect only the current test run and do not change the bound profile.
knowledge.retrievalTopKHint: Control how many candidate chunks can be returned in this run.
knowledge.retrievalThresholdHint: When enabled, the threshold is passed through to the backend and applied against the backend score for the current retrieval mode.
knowledge.retrievalThresholdBackendHint: Top K is still controlled here. The score threshold and hybrid weight are passed through directly to the backend API.
knowledge.retrievalCompareScoreHint: Hybrid retrieval is shown by fused rank only and is not threshold-filtered. Lexical and semantic thresholds filter their own raw scores, and the three score types are not directly comparable.
knowledge.retrievalSemanticWeightHint: Used only by hybrid retrieval. Keyword weight is always 1 - semantic weight, and the default is 0.5.
knowledge.retrievalDetailPlaceholder: Select a result on the left to inspect the full chunk content and metadata.
knowledge.retrievalDetailEmpty: Run a test first, then pick a result to inspect in detail.
knowledge.retrievalQueryRequired: Enter a query before running the test.
knowledge.retrievalPlaceholderDescription: Query testing, hit inspection, and explain details will be added here next.

monitoring.perfThresholdCalm: No threshold breaches in the last hour
monitoring.perfInstancesChanged: Active instances changed during the last hour

home.description: Your AI-powered intelligent ops assistant. I can help you with system health analysis, fault diagnosis, knowledge Q&A, report generation, and more.
home.askAnything: Describe your ops question or scenario...

faultQuickCheck.title: Quick Fault Diagnosis
faultQuickCheck.description: Rapidly locate the fault scope and affected services.
faultQuickCheck.prompt: A production service is experiencing anomalies. Please help me perform a quick fault diagnosis: 1) List the key metrics and logs to check first; 2) Provide a step-by-step troubleshooting guide to narrow down the scope; 3) Suggest possible root causes and their likelihood.

faultRootCause.title: Root Cause Analysis
faultRootCause.description: Deep-dive into the root cause of a known issue.
faultRootCause.prompt: We have identified a fault symptom. Please guide me through a structured root cause analysis: 1) What data should I collect? 2) Help me build a fault tree to systematically eliminate possibilities; 3) Suggest how to verify the final root cause.

faultAlarmTriage.title: Alarm Triage
faultAlarmTriage.description: Prioritize and classify a batch of alerts.
faultAlarmTriage.prompt: We are receiving multiple alerts simultaneously. Please help me: 1) Suggest a triage methodology to classify alerts by severity and urgency; 2) Identify which alerts are likely correlated to the same root cause; 3) Recommend a response priority order.

faultTimeline.title: Incident Timeline
faultTimeline.description: Build a chronological timeline of an incident.
faultTimeline.prompt: Help me construct a detailed incident timeline: 1) What events should I document (alerts, changes, user reports, actions taken)? 2) Provide a template for organizing the timeline; 3) Suggest how to identify the initial trigger event from the sequence.

faultPostmortem.title: Post-Mortem Report
faultPostmortem.description: Generate a structured post-incident review document.
faultPostmortem.prompt: Help me write a blameless post-mortem report for a recent incident. Include: 1) Incident summary and impact; 2) Timeline of events; 3) Root cause analysis; 4) What went well and what didn't; 5) Action items with owners and deadlines.

logErrorAnalysis.title: Error Log Analysis
logErrorAnalysis.description: Analyze error logs to identify patterns and causes.
logErrorAnalysis.prompt: I have a set of error logs that need analysis. Please help me: 1) Identify the most frequent error types and their distribution; 2) Find temporal patterns (do errors spike at certain times?); 3) Suggest probable causes for the top errors and recommended fixes.

logPatternDetect.title: Log Pattern Detection
logPatternDetect.description: Discover recurring patterns and anomalies in logs.
logPatternDetect.prompt: Help me detect meaningful patterns in application logs: 1) What regular expressions or rules can I use to extract key events? 2) How to identify abnormal patterns that deviate from baseline behavior? 3) Suggest a log classification strategy to group similar entries.

logTraceCorrelation.title: Trace Correlation
logTraceCorrelation.description: Correlate distributed logs across multiple services.
logTraceCorrelation.prompt: Help me correlate logs across multiple microservices for a specific request flow: 1) How to use trace IDs or request IDs to link related logs? 2) Suggest a method to reconstruct the full request path; 3) Identify where delays or errors occur in the chain.

logAnomalyDetect.title: Anomaly Detection
logAnomalyDetect.description: Identify unusual log volume or content changes.
logAnomalyDetect.prompt: Help me set up a log anomaly detection approach: 1) What baseline metrics should I track (log volume, error rate, new log patterns)? 2) How to define thresholds for alerting on anomalies? 3) Suggest strategies to reduce false positives while catching real issues.

logFilterQuery.title: Log Query Builder
logFilterQuery.description: Build effective log search queries and filters.
logFilterQuery.prompt: Help me build efficient log query filters: 1) Given a symptom description, suggest the key fields and keywords to filter on; 2) Provide example queries for common log systems (structured JSON logs, syslog, etc.); 3) Suggest how to progressively narrow down results.

perfBottleneck.title: Bottleneck Analysis
perfBottleneck.description: Identify performance bottlenecks in the system.
perfBottleneck.prompt: Help me identify performance bottlenecks: 1) What metrics should I examine (CPU, memory, IO, network, application-level)? 2) Provide a systematic approach to narrow down from infrastructure to application layer; 3) Suggest common bottleneck patterns and their symptoms.

perfDbTuning.title: Database Tuning
perfDbTuning.description: Optimize database query performance and configuration.
perfDbTuning.prompt: Help me optimize database performance: 1) What query analysis approach should I use to find slow queries? 2) Suggest indexing strategies based on common access patterns; 3) Recommend configuration parameters to tune for my workload type (read-heavy, write-heavy, or mixed).

perfCapacityPlan.title: Capacity Planning
perfCapacityPlan.description: Forecast resource needs and plan scaling strategy.
perfCapacityPlan.prompt: Help me create a capacity planning strategy: 1) What resource metrics should I trend over time? 2) How to forecast growth based on current usage patterns? 3) Suggest a scaling plan that balances cost and performance headroom.

perfCacheStrategy.title: Caching Strategy
perfCacheStrategy.description: Design or optimize a caching layer.
perfCacheStrategy.prompt: Help me design a caching strategy: 1) What data access patterns benefit most from caching? 2) Suggest appropriate cache eviction policies and TTLs for different data types; 3) How to handle cache invalidation and avoid stale data issues?

perfCostOptimize.title: Cost Optimization
perfCostOptimize.description: Reduce infrastructure costs without sacrificing reliability.
perfCostOptimize.prompt: Help me optimize infrastructure costs: 1) What are common areas of waste (idle resources, over-provisioning, unused storage)? 2) Suggest a systematic review checklist; 3) Recommend right-sizing and scheduling strategies to reduce costs while maintaining SLAs.

changeRiskReview.title: Change Risk Review
changeRiskReview.description: Assess risks before deploying a change.
changeRiskReview.prompt: Help me perform a pre-deployment risk assessment: 1) What factors should I evaluate (blast radius, rollback complexity, dependency impact)? 2) Provide a risk scoring framework; 3) Suggest risk mitigation strategies such as canary deployments, feature flags, or phased rollouts.

changeRollbackPlan.title: Rollback Plan
changeRollbackPlan.description: Design a rollback strategy for a planned change.
changeRollbackPlan.prompt: Help me create a rollback plan: 1) What rollback triggers should I define (error rate threshold, latency increase, user reports)? 2) Document step-by-step rollback procedures; 3) Identify data or state changes that may complicate rollback and how to handle them.

changeDependency.title: Dependency Impact
changeDependency.description: Analyze upstream/downstream impact of a change.
changeDependency.prompt: Help me analyze the dependency impact of a planned change: 1) How to identify all upstream and downstream services affected? 2) What communication should happen with dependent teams? 3) Suggest testing strategies to validate compatibility before and after the change.

changeChecklist.title: Change Checklist
changeChecklist.description: Generate a pre/post change verification checklist.
changeChecklist.prompt: Help me create a comprehensive change management checklist: 1) Pre-change items (approvals, backups, monitoring setup, communication); 2) During-change items (deployment steps, health checks, rollback readiness); 3) Post-change items (smoke tests, metrics verification, stakeholder notification).

kbConceptExplain.title: Concept Explainer
kbConceptExplain.description: Explain an ops concept or technology clearly.
kbConceptExplain.prompt: Please explain an operations/infrastructure concept in depth: 1) Core principles and how it works; 2) Common use cases and when to apply it; 3) Key trade-offs and pitfalls to watch for; 4) How it relates to other relevant technologies.

kbBestPractice.title: Best Practices
kbBestPractice.description: Summarize best practices for an ops topic.
kbBestPractice.prompt: Summarize the industry best practices for a specific operations topic: 1) Key principles and guidelines; 2) Common anti-patterns to avoid; 3) Recommended tools and approaches; 4) Real-world tips for implementation.

kbArchCompare.title: Architecture Comparison
kbArchCompare.prompt: Help me compare two or more architectural approaches: 1) Key differences in design philosophy; 2) Performance, scalability, and reliability trade-offs; 3) Operational complexity and maintenance burden; 4) Recommendation based on common use case scenarios.

kbTroubleshootGuide.title: Troubleshooting Guide
kbTroubleshootGuide.prompt: Help me create a troubleshooting guide for a specific system or scenario: 1) Common symptoms and their likely causes; 2) Step-by-step diagnostic commands and checks; 3) Decision tree for narrowing down the issue; 4) Resolution steps for each identified cause.

kbSecurityQa.title: Security Q&A
kbSecurityQa.prompt: Help me with a security-related operations question: 1) What are the security implications and risks? 2) What are the recommended security controls and configurations? 3) How to audit and verify the security posture? 4) Common vulnerabilities to watch for.

autoShellScript.title: Shell Script Generator
autoShellScript.description: Generate a shell script for a routine ops task.
autoShellScript.prompt: Help me write a shell script for an operations task. Requirements: 1) Include proper error handling and logging; 2) Add input validation and safety checks; 3) Make it idempotent where possible; 4) Include usage instructions and comments.

autoCronJob.title: Cron Job Setup
autoCronJob.description: Design and configure a scheduled task.
autoCronJob.prompt: Help me set up a cron job / scheduled task: 1) Generate the appropriate cron expression for my schedule; 2) Write the task script with proper logging and error handling; 3) Suggest monitoring to detect silent failures; 4) Include lock mechanisms to prevent overlapping runs.

autoHealthCheck.title: Health Check Script
autoHealthCheck.description: Create a comprehensive service health check.
autoHealthCheck.prompt: Help me write a health check script for my services: 1) What endpoints and metrics to verify (HTTP status, response time, resource usage); 2) How to report status (exit codes, output format); 3) Suggest alerting thresholds; 4) Include dependency checks (database, cache, external APIs).

autoBatchOps.title: Batch Operations
autoBatchOps.description: Script a safe batch operation across hosts or resources.
autoBatchOps.prompt: Help me create a script for batch operations across multiple targets: 1) Include a dry-run mode for preview; 2) Add progress reporting and error handling per target; 3) Support parallel execution with concurrency limits; 4) Include rollback/undo capabilities.

autoReportGen.title: Ops Report Generator
autoReportGen.prompt: Help me create a script that generates an operations report: 1) What metrics and status data to collect (uptime, incidents, changes, performance); 2) Format the output as a clear summary with highlights and action items; 3) Support different time ranges (daily, weekly, monthly); 4) Include trend comparisons with the previous period.

skill.title: Skills
skill.uninstallWarning: This only removes the installed copy from the current agent. The Skill Market package is not modified.

skillMarket.title: Skill Market
skillMarket.subtitle: Manage reusable skill packages and install them into agents.
skillMarket.drawerSubtitle: Install reusable skills into {{agent}} without leaving agent configuration.
skillMarket.emptyDescription: Create or import a skill package to make it available for agents.
skillMarket.noMatchSkills: No skill packages match the current search.
skillMarket.deleteWarning: This removes the skill package from Skill Market. Agents that already installed a copy are not modified.
skillMarket.importDuplicateSkill: A skill with the same id already exists. Rename the skill directory or SKILL.md name, then import again.
skillMarket.directoryNameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. This becomes the skill directory and cannot be changed after creation.
skillMarket.descriptionPlaceholder: Use when users need to analyze service logs, identify recurring errors, and produce root-cause recommendations.
skillMarket.defaultInstructions:
---
name: ops-skill-name
description: Describe when this skill should be used and what outcome it produces.
---

# Ops Skill Name

## When to Use

Use this skill when the user asks to investigate or operate a specific production scenario.

## Required Inputs

- Target system, service, host, or cluster
- Time range
- Relevant logs, alerts, metrics, tickets, or commands

## Workflow

1. Confirm the scope and the affected service.
2. Collect only the evidence needed for the scenario.
3. Identify the most likely cause with supporting facts.
4. Recommend safe next actions and rollback checks.

## Output Format

### Summary

### Evidence

### Root Cause

### Recommended Actions

## Rules

- Do not fabricate evidence.
- Call out uncertainty when data is incomplete.
- Prefer low-risk read-only checks before write operations.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Manage external messaging channels, default agents, and real-user connection settings.
channels.refreshStatusDescription: Pull the latest login and session snapshot from the channel runtime.
channels.checkStatusDescription: Run a connectivity and configuration verification against the current channel.
channels.disableDescription: Remove this channel from active routing until it is re-enabled.
channels.enableDescription: Put this channel back into active routing and runtime checks.
channels.name: Channel Name
channels.emptyDescription: Create a channel instance first, then connect a real-user channel session.
channels.basicDesc: Set the channel name and choose which agent should handle this connected channel.
channels.createOwnershipHint: This channel belongs to the current signed-in user. External-channel conversations should flow into the same copilot session universe you see in the web app.
channels.ownershipNote: Messages arriving through this channel are owned by this user and should appear in the same copilot conversation history as web interactions.
channels.whatsappDesc: This channel follows a real-user WhatsApp Web login flow instead of Meta Cloud API credentials.
channels.wechatDesc: This channel uses QR-based WeChat login, receives inbound messages via long-polling, and bridges them into the current user's copilot sessions.
channels.connectionDesc: Review the current channel login state and where local auth state is stored.
channels.connectionHint: QR login and reconnect flow will attach to this channel instance. No Meta developer token is required for this mode.
channels.wechatConnectionHint: Click Connect to generate a WeChat QR code. After the scan is confirmed, this channel will start receiving WeChat messages and bridge them into sessions.
channels.qrHint: Scan this QR code in WhatsApp -> Linked Devices.
channels.qrHint_wechat: Scan and confirm this QR code in WeChat to authorize the channel.
channels.statusDesc: Shows whether this channel is ready to receive real-user traffic.
channels.runtimeDesc: Review recent bindings and configuration events for troubleshooting.
channels.selfTestDesc: Send a WhatsApp self-chat test through the same session and outbox pipeline used by the live channel.
